prestazioni: AMS Performance Alpha 12 MERCEDES-AMG M120 7.3L V12 twin-turbo system with Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos, custom billet compressor wheels, and 106mm titanium-aluminide turbine wheels, supporting 1,200+ HP on E85 fuel with a bespoke Pagani-specific wastegate setup and 4.5-bar Bosch Motorsport fuel system

Pagani-approved HWA AG custom dry-sump lubrication system with dual scavenge pumps, titanium oil pan, and integrated Accusump 3-quart pre-oiler for sustained lateral G-forces during track use, paired with a Setrab 10-row oil cooler and Motul 300V Trophy 15W-50 fully synthetic oil

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, Pagani-specific spring rates (12kg/mm front, 18kg/mm rear), and spherical bearing top mounts, combined with a full Pagani Cinque-derived carbon-titanium subframe reinforcement kit and AP Racing 6-piston monobloc calipers with 420mm CCM-R carbon-ceramic rotors
estetica: Full Pagani Zonda Cinque-inspired carbon-fiber aero package with a 3D-printed titanium rear diffuser, active Gurney flap, and a fixed carbon-fiber front splitter with integrated canards, all finished in tri-color Italian flag livery with matte clear coat

Bespoke Novitec Torado-style forged aluminum wheels (20x10 front, 21x13 rear) with titanium wheel bolts, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (255/30 R20 front, 355/25 R21 rear) and a custom Pagani-branded center cap

Full interior rework with carbon-fiber Recaro Pole Position seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified), Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a Pagani-specific MOMO carbon-fiber steering wheel with integrated AIM MXS Strada dash display and tri-color stitching
